heading: Nuclear-powered aircraft carriers: dismantlement and disposal
label: 8691 Nuclear-powered aircraft carriers: dismantlement and disposal
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8691 was renumbered .section 9253 of this title
Amendments2018—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 807(d)(2)section 7321 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .section 807(d)(2) of Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
amendments: Amendments2018—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 807(d)(2)section 7321 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .section 807(d)(2) of Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.text: A cost and schedule baseline for the dismantlement and disposal approved by the service acquisition executive of the Department of the Navy and the Chief of Naval Operations.

children.label: A
children.text: a certification from that entity of its agreement to serve as the regulatory enforcement authority; and

children.label: B
children.text: a description of the legal basis for the authority of that entity to serve as the regulatory enforcement authority.
A summary of activities and significant developments in connection with such dismantlement and disposal.

If applicable, a detailed description of cost and schedule performance against the baseline for such dismantlement and disposal established pursuant to subsection (a), including a description of and explanation for any variance from such baseline.

children.label: A
children.text: Each fiscal year covered by the future-years defense program.

children.label: B
children.text: Any fiscal years before the fiscal years covered by the future-years defense program.

children.label: C
children.text: Any fiscal years after the end of the period of the future-years defense program.

children.heading: .—Future-years Defense Program Defined
children.label: c .—Future-years Defense Program Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “future-years defense program” means the future-years defense program required by .section 221 of this title
